mapper.sql: p.id, p.name, p.category_id, p.address, p.longitude, p.latitude, p.images, p.contact_phone, p.opening_hours, p.description, p.tags, p.visit_count, p.favorite_count, p.rating, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , c.name as category_name FROM place p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT , c.name as category_name FROM place p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id ORDER BY p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place ( name, category_id, address, longitude, latitude, images, contact_phone, opening_hours, description, tags, visit_count, favorite_count, rating, status, create_by, source_type, source_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{images}, #{contactPhone}, #{openingHours}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{visitCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{rating}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO place ( name, category_id, address, longitude, latitude, images, contact_phone, opening_hours, description, tags, visit_count, favorite_count, rating, status, create_by, source_type, source_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.name}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.address}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.images}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.openingHours}, #{item.description}, #{item.tags}, #{item.visitCount}, #{item.favoriteCount}, #{item.rating}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.sourceId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND favorite_count > 0
UPDATE place SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE place SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM place WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, COUNT(p.id) as count FROM category c LEFT JOIN place p ON c.id = p.category_id AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT LEFT(address, 2) as areaName, COUNT(*) as count FROM place WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY LEFT(address, 2) ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
